languages.text: "Оповести Сектор Бионика: я желаю установить новый аугмент".
"Alert the Sector Bionica: I wish to have a new augment installed."
languages.original_text: "Оповести Сектор Бионика: я желаю установить новый аугмент".

traits.locale_text: "Alert the Sector Bionica: I wish to have a new augment installed."
"Alert the Sector Bionica: I wish to have a new augment installed."
"Alert the Sector Bionica: I wish to have a new augment installed."

languages.text: «Avise al Sector Bionica: deseo que me instalen un nuevo aumento».
languages.original_text: "Alert the Sector Bionica: I wish to have a new augment installed."

traits.locale_text: «Avise al Sector Bionica: deseo que me instalen un nuevo aumento».

languages.text: “通知仿生区：我要安装一个新的植入物。”
languages.original_text: "Alert the Sector Bionica: I wish to have a new augment installed."

traits.locale_text: “通知仿生区：我要安装一个新的植入物。”

languages.text: « Alertez le secteur Bionica. J'aimerais me faire poser une nouvelle augmentation. »
languages.original_text: "Alert the Sector Bionica: I wish to have a new augment installed."

traits.locale_text: « Alertez le secteur Bionica. J'aimerais me faire poser une nouvelle augmentation. »

languages.text: "Sektör Biyonika'yı uyarın. Yeni bir ogment taktırmak istiyorum."
languages.original_text: "Alert the Sector Bionica: I wish to have a new augment installed."

traits.locale_text: "Sektör Biyonika'yı uyarın. Yeni bir ogment taktırmak istiyorum."

languages.text: "Alarmiert den Sector Bionica: Ich möchte eine neue Augmentation installieren."
languages.original_text: "Alert the Sector Bionica: I wish to have a new augment installed."

traits.locale_text: "Alarmiert den Sector Bionica: Ich möchte eine neue Augmentation installieren."

languages.text: 「セクター・ビオニカに連絡を。新しい増幅器を装着したい。」
languages.original_text: "Alert the Sector Bionica: I wish to have a new augment installed."

traits.locale_text: 「セクター・ビオニカに連絡を。新しい増幅器を装着したい。」
